primeiro_paragrafo: Andrey Nikolaevich Kolmogorov (Russian: –ź–Ĺ–ī—Ä–ĶŐĀ–Ļ –Ě–ł–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–įŐĀ–Ķ–≤–ł—á –ö–ĺ–Ľ–ľ–ĺ–≥–ĺŐĀ—Ä–ĺ–≤, IPA: […źnňądr ≤ej n ≤…™k…źňąlaj…™v ≤…™t…ē k…ôlm…źňą…°or…ôf] ‚ďė, 25 April 1903 ‚Äď 20 October 1987)[4][5] was a Soviet mathematician who played a central role in the creation of modern probability theory.
